title: Inventory Hud
description: Displays selected PvP inventory items as an Overlay
body:
# Inventory Display

Inventory Display shows your selected PvP items directly above the hunger bar for faster access and better visibility during combat.

## Features

- Displays selected inventory items above the hunger bar
- Clean and minimal HUD integration
- Designed for PvP gameplay
- Lightweight and simple to use
- Supports modern Minecraft versions

## Perfect For

- PvP players
- Competitive gameplay
- Fast inventory management

## Notes

The mod is designed to stay minimal and non-intrusive while improving item visibility during fights.
